task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened and read the maintenance ticket for instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/maintenance_ticket_104.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the telescope is pointed at Capella and the V-band filter is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Astronomy control software (e.g., KStars, Ekos, or INDI control panel) showing the telescope tracking 'Capella' (RA ~5.278h, Dec ~45.998°) and the filter wheel set to 'V-band' or 'Slot 2'.

task_completion.description: Verify FITS files were captured at the three required focus positions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing three FITS files in '/home/ga/Maintenance/collimation_test' with prefixes 'focus_50000_', 'focus_40000_', and 'focus_60000_'.

task_completion.description: Verify the sky context capture was saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or image viewer showing 'field_context.png' saved in '/home/ga/Maintenance/collimation_test'.

task_completion.description: Verify the completion report was created in the output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor showing 'report.txt' located in '/home/ga/Maintenance/collimation_test'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used actual astronomy/observatory control software to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GUI interaction with software like KStars, Ekos, or an INDI client, rather than just using 'touch' or 'echo' in the terminal to fake the output files.

integrity.description: Ensure the captured files appear to be genuine simulator outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: If any FITS viewer or image viewer is open, the images should display simulated star fields or camera noise, not completely blank canvases or text files renamed to image extensions.

integrity.description: Ensure the completion report contains actual task execution details.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of 'report.txt' (if visible) should reflect the actions taken (e.g., mentioning Capella, the focus values, or the V-band filter) rather than just a verbatim copy-paste of the original task prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Capella (RA: 5.278 hours / 05h 16m 41s, Dec: 45.998 degrees / +45d 59m 52s). Required Filter: V-band (Slot 2). Required Focus Positions: 50000 (nominal), 40000 (intra), 60000 (extra). Output Directory: /home/ga/Maintenance/collimation_test. Expected Files: FITS files starting with 'focus_50000_', 'focus_40000_', and 'focus_60000_', a context image named 'field_context.png', and a text file named 'report.txt'.
